            cell [e529] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: ```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique EX-0018 (Non-Kinetic Physical Attack), control CM0082 (Deception and Decoys) and control CM0085 (Electromagnetic Shielding) serve complementary but distinct roles in mitigating risks. CM0082 employs tactical deception to mislead adversaries about satellite locations, capabilities, and operational status, making it harder to accurately target satellites with electromagnetic attacks (as evidenced by QRA showing how deception obscures targeting information). CM0085 provides physical protection by using specialized materials to absorb/deflect high-powered microwaves and electromagnetic pulses, directly preventing component damage (as shown in QRA evidence demonstrating shielding's protective effects against EX-0018's EMP/HPM threats). While CM0082 disrupts attack targeting, CM0085 neutralizes the attack's effects when targeting succeeds.\", \"citations\": [\"EX-0018\", \"CM0082\", \"CM0085\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [\"Evidence does not show direct interaction between CM0082 and CM0085 - relationship is inferred from their independent mitigations of EX-0018\"] } ```" [e530] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0011::CM0002::CM0044 • create-evidence-case-adjudication-1777310051-160" [e531] [cursor=pointer]
                generic "rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0011::CM0002::CM0044" [e532] [cursor=pointer]

            cell [e534] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open full prompt for rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0011::CM0002::CM0044" [e535] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e536] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open formatted response JSON" [e537]
                generic "```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique EX-0018 (Non-Kinetic Physical Attack), control CM0082 ..." [e538]
            cell "Complete: grounded response accepted" [e539] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open full evidence case for rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0011::CM0002::CM0044" [e540] [cursor=pointer]
            cell "7382ms" [e541] [cursor=pointer]
            cell "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324-TEE" [e542] [cursor=pointer]
          row [e543] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e544] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: ```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique EX-0013 (Flooding), control CM0036 (Session Termination) and control CM0070 (Alternate Communications Paths) serve complementary roles in mitigating communication disruptions. CM0036 addresses the termination of inactive or compromised sessions to prevent prolonged exposure to flooding attacks, thereby limiting the window of opportunity for adversaries to inject noise or malformed data. CM0070 provides redundancy by establishing alternate communication paths, ensuring that if the primary channel is flooded or otherwise compromised, the spacecraft can switch to a secondary channel to maintain command and control. The QRA evidence indicates that CM0070 specifically mitigates the Erroneous Input (EX-0013.02) sub-technique by allowing spacecraft to switch to unaffected channels when the primary channel is flooded.\", \"citations\": [\"EX-0013\", \"CM0036\", \"CM0070\", \"EX-0013.02\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [\"The evidence does not provide explicit details on the interaction between CM0036 and CM0070 beyond their individual roles in mitigating flooding attacks.\"] } ```" [e545] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0013::CM0029::CM0070 • create-evidence-case-adjudication-1777310051-160" [e546] [cursor=pointer]
                generic "rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0013::CM0029::CM0070" [e547] [cursor=pointer]
                generic "create-qras • create-evidence-case-adjudication-1777310051-160" [e548] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e549] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open full prompt for rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0013::CM0029::CM0070" [e550] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e551] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open formatted response JSON" [e552]
                generic "```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique EX-0013 (Flooding), control CM0036 (Session Terminatio..." [e553]
            cell "Complete: grounded response accepted" [e554] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open full evidence case for rel::tech_related_controls::EX-0013::CM0029::CM0070" [e555] [cursor=pointer]
            cell "11733ms" [e556] [cursor=pointer]
            cell "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324-TEE" [e557] [cursor=pointer]
          row [e558] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e559] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: { \"content\": \"In the context of EX-0011 (Exploit Reduced Protections During Safe-Mode), the related controls CM0002 (COMSEC) and CM0044 (Cyber-safe Mode) both contribute to mitigating the technique, but focus on different aspects. CM0002 ensures that cryptographic security is maintained on the TT&C link during safe-mode, thereby authenticating commands and preventing adversaries from exploiting reduced protections (Primary QRA Evidence). CM0044 ensures the spacecraft enters a configuration-controlled and integrity-protected state with validated software and nonessential systems shut down, preventing the execution of malicious commands (Primary QRA Evidence). The crosswalk chain directly maps EX-0011 to CM0044. While the evidence does not explicitly detail the relationship between the two controls, they are complementary: CM0002 secures the communication channel and CM0044 secures the system state, together providing layered defense against EX-0011.\", \"citations\": [\"CM0002\", \"CM0044\", \"EX-0011\", \"CWE-1390\"], \"confidence\": \"medium\", \"caveats\": [ \"The evidence does not explicitly define a direct relationship between CM0002 and CM0044; their relationship is inferred from their individual roles in mitigating EX-0011.\", \"The analysis is limited to the provided evidence and does not incorporate external sources.\" ] }" [e560] [cursor=pointer]
